Ubiquitous
  Engines
    Dungine - Dungeon Crawler

  Tools
    Studio - Game development



UB

`UbiquitousTextGame List`: Lists available text games


`UbiquitousTextGame %GameName%`: Launches the specified text game


Carts have game types:
- TextGameType000: Runs on any version of the engine
- TextGameType001: Basic text-based game with limited features
- TextGameType002: Advanced text-based game with full features
- TextGameType003: Experimental text-based game with cutting-edge features
- TextGameType004: Future text-based game with experimental features
-
